name: Dusekkar, the Protecting Pumpkin
description:

AND HOLY SHIT DID I COME ACROSS THE BEST PICTURE EVER :D

anyways its a thick ass Dusekkar, and "he" is now a SHE! fem! (she is 6'3 not counting the antlers, but 6'9 counting them)

ALSO SHE'S 43 CAUSE YK SHE REACHING UNC STATUS
